name: ICHOR HOLDINGS, LTD.
summary: Ichor Holdings, Ltd. (ICHR) is a provider of fluid delivery subsystems and components for semiconductor capital equipment. The company designs and manufactures gas and liquid delivery systems used in the fabrication of semiconductors. Its products are critical subsystems integrated into equipment used in semiconductor manufacturing processes.

products.name: Gas Delivery Subsystems
products.description: Fluid delivery subsystems that manage and control the flow of gases used in semiconductor fabrication equipment.

products.name: Liquid Delivery Subsystems
products.description: Fluid delivery subsystems that manage and control the flow of liquids used in semiconductor fabrication equipment.
